tags.description: List of tags for the resource

storage.description: DTO representing the storage configuration for HPC nodes, including size and number of replicas.
storage.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCStorageDto

ram.description:
DTO representing the RAM configuration for HPC nodes, including size in GB.
This is optional as some SKUs may not require explicit RAM configuration.
ram.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCRamDto

node.description:
DTO representing the specifications of the HPC nodes, including SKU, operating system, number of replicas,
storage details, and RAM configuration.
node.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCNodeDto

loadBalancer.description: DTO representing the load balancer configuration for the HPC, including SKU and number of replicas.
loadBalancer.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCLoadBalancerDto

network.description:
DTO representing the network configuration for the HPC, including public IP size, bandwidth, multi-cloud link capability,
mobile VPN support, and load balancer details.
network.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCNetworkDto

firewall.description: DTO representing the firewall configuration for the HPC, including SKU information.
firewall.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCFirewallDto

details.description:
DTO representing the details of the backup configuration for the HPC, including the number of licenses and 
storage units required for backup.
details.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCBackupDetailsDto

backup.description: DTO representing the backup configuration for the HPC, including whether backup is enabled and details about licenses and storage.
backup.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCBackupDto

details.description: DTO representing the details of the disaster recovery configuration for the HPC, including the number of managers required.
details.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCDisasterRecoveryDetailsDto

disasterRecovery.description:
DTO representing the disaster recovery configuration for the HPC, including whether disaster recovery is
enabled and details about the number of managers required.
disasterRecovery.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCDisasterRecoveryDto

management.description: DTO representing the management options for the HPC, including notes, backup configuration, disaster recovery settings,
management.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCManagementDto

properties.description:
DTO which encapsulates all relevant information about the HPC, such as node specifications, 
network configuration, firewall settings, and management options.
properties.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCPropertiesDto

schema.description:
DTO representing a HPC (High Performance Computing) resource, including its properties and configuration details.
This DTO is used in the API by client to create HPC resources.
schema.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Dtos.Hpcs.HPCDto
